query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, vp.* 
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V003';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT pv.id, pv.variantCode, vp.*
